nasb.text: Here is the perseverance of the saints who keep the commandments of God and their faith in Jesus.

esv.text: Here is a call for the endurance of the saints, those who keep the commandments of God and their faith in Jesus.

cnv.text: 在這裡，那些遵守　神的命令和耶穌的信仰的聖徒，要有忍耐。

ccb.text: 但持守上帝诫命和耶稣真道的圣徒们需要坚忍。

csbs.text: 遵守神的命令、持守对耶稣信仰的圣徒们的忍耐，就在这里。”
